caption: A man wearing a dark blazer over a white t-shirt and a lanyard stands on a stage during a presentation at EuroPython in Edinburgh, which took place from July 23 to 29, 2018. He is positioned to the left of a large digital screen that displays a slide titled "CRYPTO-ML LTD." The slide includes the text, "Let's jump the hype-train!", "A large scale crypto-analysis platform", "Heavy compute data analysis, Transform, Fetch...", "Going deep running predictions on LSTMs", and the question "CAN WE SURVIVE THE 2017 CRYPTO-CRAZE?". A EuroPython logo and the event location and date are visible at the bottom of the screen. As the video progresses, the man shifts his posture and gestures with his hands while speaking, moving from a neutral stance to one where he is actively emphasizing a point with his right hand.
